I'm Mohamad Alkhaber, a UX designer and entrepreneur based in Oslo. I turn ideas into real products, through research, design, and just enough code to make things work.

View my work Let's talk
Based in Oslo, Norway

About me

Technology with a purpose.

I started out studying Chemical Engineering, moved to Norway, learned the language, and eventually found my real passion: building things that people actually want to use. That path gave me an unusual mix of analytical thinking and creative problem solving.

I hold a Bachelor's in Informatics: Design, Use and Interaction from the University of Oslo, and I'm currently in my Master's in Entrepreneurship and Innovation Management, which is less about textbooks and more about going from idea to real product, fast.

Whether I'm sketching flows in Figma, writing Kotlin for an Android app, or helping a team evaluate a startup opportunity, I bring the same approach: understand the problem first, then build something that genuinely solves it.

Selected Work

Things I've built.

A mix of apps, hardware, and interfaces — each started with a real user problem and ended with something tangible.

01 / Android App
Android · KotlinFigmaUX Research
Solar Panel Android App
An Android app that helps homeowners estimate how much energy their roof can produce and what they can save per year. Went through multiple design iterations based on real user testing, what you see here is the latest version. Want to see the full journey? Head over to Behance.
See full process on Behance
02 / Hardware
Arduino · C++UX Research
Turpartner
A physical device built to help elderly people stay more socially connected. I handled user interviews, interactive prototyping, and C++ firmware for the Arduino. Built with a three-person team over one semester at UiO.
Read the project page at UiO
03 / Hardware Product
HardwareStartupMaster's Project
LunaCrib
A smart baby product developed as a startup within the Master's program. Our team identified a real pain point for parents, designed a mechanical solution, and built a working prototype. Final product version still in progress, keeping the full concept close for now.
Final version coming soon
04 / UI Design
FigmaPrototyping
Store Interface
An interactive retail interface designed in Figma, covering user flows from product browsing all the way through to payment. Built two distinct prototype versions to test different navigation patterns and layouts.
View on Behance
05 / Mobile UI
FigmaMobile UI
Music Playlist Interface
A mobile music app UI designed in Figma with home screen, playlist view, and playback screen. The focus was keeping navigation intuitive while making the visual design feel engaging enough that you actually want to open it.
View on Behance
06 / Mobile UI
FigmaMaster's Project
Smart Robot App for Cat Owners
A companion app concept for a smart pet robot, designed as part of the Master's program to test the idea in real-life scenarios. Lets owners monitor, feed, and interact with their cat remotely, with a clean and friendly feel that fits the product's tone.
View on Behance
07 / Research
Startup AnalysisTeam Research
Startup Opportunity Analysis
As part of the Master's program, our team evaluated 4 different startup opportunities, assessing market size, business models, competitive landscape, and innovation potential. Less theory, more real decisions about whether something is actually worth building.
Academic project · 2025–2026 · UiO
